_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Disruption in tissue architecture at these injection sites was limited to inflammation, as evidenced by the presence of LCA-positive cells (Figure 4D). LCA-positive inflammatory cells were only a minor component of the cellular constituents in the induced tumors
details: Successfully identified LCA-positive inflammatory cells at injection sites, distinguishing inflammation from tumor formation
